## Description
Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Safety enhancement
- [ ] Dependency update

## Related issues
Closes #(issue number)

## Safety considerations
If this PR involves agent behavior or safety mechanisms, describe:
- [ ] Changes to failure detection
- [ ] Changes to containment mechanisms
- [ ] Changes to audit logging
- [ ] New potential failure modes introduced
- [ ] Mitigations for new failure modes

## Testing
Describe the tests you've added or modified:
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Safety/failure scenario tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing completed

**Test plan:**
1. Step 1
2. Step 2
3. ...

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows the project style guidelines
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] TypeScript: No type errors (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Builds successfully (`pnpm build`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] Safety documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if this is a user-facing change)

## Breaking changes
Describe any breaking changes here. None if this is not a breaking change.

## Additional context
Add any other context about the PR here (design decisions, trade-offs, safety implications, etc.).
